top.head: IQ Option VIP shares
top.mass: Rifat Barbaros Aral  —  an IQ Option VIP trader with an astonishing success story  — has graciously agreed to answer a few of our questions.

one.tittle: Tell us a little about yourself : where are you from and what do you do for living?
one.text: My name is Barbaros Aral. I’m originally from Turkey, but I currently live in Czech Republic. Until recently I’ve been working as a software engineer for over 20 years.

two.tittle: How did you get started with binary options?
two.text:
For years I’ve been reading about binary options, but I was hesitant to invest. Then finally I decided to try it, but since I had no system or strategy to my trading I blew all of my funds.
Fortunately, I soon realized that I needed to treat trading more seriously if I wanted make money. Because I'm a software engineer, I decided to analyze the market by myself and developed an indicator according to my strategy. Ever since then, I have not been working for another company or for somebody else.

three.tittle: Do I have to use the same payment option to withdraw as I did to deposit?
three.text: Yes, it’s important that you withdraw to the same card or e-wallet you used initially, otherwise the system will cancel the request. The withdrawal amount must not be larger than the deposit made from that card (no amount limits for the e-wallets, though).

four.tittle: Have you used other platforms? Can you compare those to IQ Option?
four.text: Of course, I tried many platforms. I like that IQ Option gives an opportunity to invest as little as 1$. It's very important for beginners or those who have little money. Also, other platforms don’t allow you to enter the amount yourself, they just have drop down menu and you can’t choose the exact amount you wish. I love that IQ Option is flexible that way. Another thing I appreciate is that you can divide your screen into up to 9 small trading windows.

five.tittle: What’s the secret to your success in trading?
five.text: The secret to my success is actually very simple. We are human and we all have a wild horse inside of us. We must learn how to control it. I mean we must learn where to STOP, take a breath, refresh our mind and stick on our strategy.

six.tittle: Is there anything you could advise to those starting out with binary options?
six.text: What I can tell the beginners is this: binary option trading is not a computer game. Yes, you can make money, but you can also lose all of your investment. So, first things first - you must learn how to trade and manage your risks. I wish good luck for all of you.
